channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House shooting: Gunman killed after opening fire Saturday night
item.description: An armed individual approached the White House and fired shots Saturday evening, according to multiple reports. The suspect was later killed.

item.title: Democrats use Epstein scandal in attack ads against GOP midterm candidates
item.description: Top Democratic candidates are airing ads linking Republican opponents to the Jeffrey Epstein scandal ahead of the midterms.

item.title: Exclusive: Details of the Iran deal Trump is close to signing
item.description: The U.S.-Iran deal includes a 60-day ceasefire extension and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump urges Muslim leaders to sign peace deal with Israel after Iran war
item.description: President Trump called on Arab and Muslim leaders to sign a peace deal with Israel once the Iran war ends.
